---
title: 'What do you need from Daddy to be a better Daddy?'
date: '2014-01-27T13:04:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8659631292086740975'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/what-do-you-need-from-daddy-to-be.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Life Events'
---

What do you need from Daddy to be a better Daddy?<br />
<br />
01/26/2014<br />
<br />
Conversation at Pei Wei<br />
<br />
Connor:<br />
&nbsp;- Be nice<br />
&nbsp;- No yelling<br />
&nbsp;- Stop slapping<br />
&nbsp;- Stop interrupting<br />
&nbsp;- Buy me more Lego's<br />
Preston:<br />
&nbsp;- No spankings<br />
&nbsp;- Play more games<br />
&nbsp;- Teach us to be a ninja.<br />
&nbsp;-
